dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, things are worse than before. Your efforts to {quest_action} helped, but {quest_threat} struck again and undid much of our progress.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that {quest_focus} is under renewed pressure. The {enemy_type} are taking advantage of the chaos {location_hint}. We need to deal with them while shoring up what is left of {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are fighting on two fronts: nature and creatures. We need you now more than ever.

playerResponses.text: I will hold the line. Tell me where to start.
This disaster keeps getting worse. But I am still here.
Even I cannot fight the elements.

dialogueChunks.intro: More trouble, {player_name}. Since you started to {quest_action}, we discovered that {quest_threat} caused more damage than we realized.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus} is compromised and {quest_stakes} are at risk of total loss. {quest_ally} found that {enemy_type} have nested in the wreckage {location_hint}. We need to clear them out and recover any {quest_item} before it is too late.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we lose {quest_stakes}, there is nothing left to rebuild.

playerResponses.text: I will not let it come to that. Send me in.
Nested in the wreckage? Lovely. Fine, I will clear them.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, an aftershock of {quest_threat} hit while you were working to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} was nearly caught in it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The area around {quest_focus} is now crawling with displaced {enemy_type} {location_hint}. People cannot get close enough to continue repairs. Someone needs to secure the perimeter and salvage what {quest_item} remain.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes} hang by a thread. We need the area safe before we can save anything.

playerResponses.text: Clear the area, save the supplies. I can do both.
The danger keeps piling up. What choice do we have?
